c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating potential reach for sellers.
The cost associated with listing an item for sale on the platform.
The percentage or fixed fee deducted from the sale price upon a successful transaction.
The simplicity and intuitiveness of the platform's interface for listing and managing items.
The regions or countries where the platform operates and has a significant user base.
The range of product categories supported by the platform for listings.
The methods available for buyers to pay and sellers to receive funds.
The assistance or services provided by the platform for shipping items to buyers.
Policies and measures in place to protect sellers from fraud or disputes.
The level of interaction and support among users within the platform's community.
